ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier linking to the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the manuscript */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the manuscript was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the manuscript (e.g., submitted, in review, published) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the manuscript was submitted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the manuscript was last updated */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief summary of the manuscript */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Relevant keywords associated with the manuscript */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Journal where the manuscript is published */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the journal */,
  "citation_style" TEXT /* Citation style used for the manuscript */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the manuscript is published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the author is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* Author's ORCID identifier */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Author's research interests */,
  "institutional_email" TEXT /* Author's institutional email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_paper" (
  "author_paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author-paper relationship */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author contributing to the paper */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being authored */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the paper (e.g., lead author, co-author) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the author's contribution to the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_paper_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_paper_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer providing feedback */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation made by the reviewer (e.g., accept, revise, reject) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., peer review, editorial review) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Reviewer's rating of the manuscript (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the reviewer's recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "expertise_areas" TEXT /* Reviewer's areas of expertise */,
  "reviewer_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editorial_board" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the editor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the editor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the editor (e.g., chief editor, associate editor) */,
  "editorial_experience" TEXT /* Editor's editorial experience */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Editor's research interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editorial_reviews" (
  "editorial_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editorial review */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being reviewed */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor making the decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date of the editorial decision */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Final decision made by the editor (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the editorial decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editorial_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editorial_reviews_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editorial_board ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editorial_reviews_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_logs" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission event */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper submitted */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the paper */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., new submission, revision) */,
  "submission_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., author, reviewer, editor) */,
  "name" TEXT /* User's full name */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "eissn" TEXT /* eISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper, technical report) */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., number of submissions, average time to publication) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "metric_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
